$description: Radio button component tokens — single-selection control within a group. Mirrors checkbox token structure with a circle instead of a rounded-square box. Checked state uses the action color. All label/foreground pairings verified WCAG AA.

radio.$description: Individual radio button. Used inside <rr-radio-group> which handles name/value coordination and form participation. Visual: 16px circle with 8px filled inner dot when checked.

unchecked.$description: Resting radio background — page canvas, border defines the circle boundary.

checked.$description: Inner dot fill when checked — phosphor green.

disabled.$description: Disabled radio background — recedes the control.

dot.$description: Inner selection dot — on-action dark on green background. Not used in current implementation (dot is the background itself).

label.$description: Label text beside the radio — secondary foreground. 8.0:1 AA.

disabled.$description: Label and circle when disabled — deeply receded.

checked.$description: Circle border when checked — matches green fill.
